headline: How Bunge’s New Debt Deal and US$3 Billion Buyback Plan Will Impact Bunge Global (BG) Investors
summary: Bunge Global SA recently completed the pricing of a US$1.20 billion senior notes offering and, earlier in March 2026, its board authorized a share repurchase program of up to US$3.00 billion through Bunge Limited (NYSE: BG). This combination of new long-term funding capacity and a sizable buyback authorization highlights management’s focus on capital structure flexibility and returning excess cash to shareholders. Next, we’ll examine how Bunge Global’s large share repurchase authorization...
